description: LATHE workstation can only be used by one technician at a time
MILL workstation can only be used by one technician at a time
SUPERVISOR collects all 4 job completion reports (2 per technician) before terminating
Job done channel from TECHNICIAN_A / TECHNICIAN_B to SUPERVISOR carries completion reports
Each technician nondeterministically chooses which workstation to use first if both are available
Each technician completes one job then must do the remaining job on the other workstation
Both TECHNICIAN_A and TECHNICIAN_B need both LATHE and MILL (one job on each)
When one workstation is occupied, technician uses the alternative workstation instead of waiting
